posts.author: Shri (Snehashri)
posts.cookedHtml:
When we are exporting the board to the excel can this will be possible.

  1. export the exact board as we have with in Monday with exact column? 2) There should be an option to export the data for particular user who wanted the backup for their data in monday.com

Regards
Shri
